commit.subject: Update PRD-01: Add Agent Registry (YAML), autonomous agent creation, and Agent Mail CLI

analysis_result.analysis: The commit introduces critical infrastructure for agent management (YAML registry) and user interaction (CLI), significantly advancing the core functionality of the system. However, despite the substantial code changes (98 lines), the lack of updates to plan.md and changelog.md suggests a gap in project tracking and documentation maintenance.
